classObjective: Translate algebraic equations and formulas into complete verbal sentences and interpret formulas in context.
workedExamples: 2-1, Example 4 — Write a Sentence for Each Equation
2-1, Example 5 — Write a Sentence for Each Equation (continued)
warmUp: Read the equation 3x + 7 = 22 aloud in words
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: reading equations left to right; geometric and scientific formula interpretation
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice translating algebraic equations to verbal sentences and interpreting formulas
independentPractice: Practice problems translating equations to complete sentences and interpreting formulas in context
assessment: Exit ticket: translate an equation to a verbal sentence and explain what it models
capReflection: Why is it important to be able to read equations as complete sentences rather than just isolated expressions?
